lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Hello, I've got some wares in you might have lost. Care to take a look?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you and what do you sell?

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: I'm Chris, travelling repairman. If you need something repaired, I can do it for you if you've got the money for it.

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: I've also got a collection of items people end up losing a lot. Nothing fancy, and certainly nothing you couldn't get elsewhere, maybe for free. Still, I charge a convenience fee for having it right here. Interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me what you've got.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About items that break when people kill me...

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Yeah, some things will break if you get killed in the Wilderness. And if you die deep in the Wilderness, they can vanish altogether.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you fix them?

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: For a fee, sure. Just show me the broken item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you stop them vanishing in deep Wilderness?

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Well, if you bring me a Trouver Parchment and some coins, I can enchant some items so they won't disappear if you end up losing them deep in the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: If you need a Trouver Parchment, there's a mage up in Ferox Enclave called Justine who sells them. I've also heard rumours there's a cave in the Wilderness with creatures that sometimes carry them as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would wild creatures be carrying magic parchments?

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Eh, some poor sap walks in carrying one, gets himself killed, and the creature just hangs on to it as a trophy? I can see it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Hey there. I can't offer my usual services right now, but if you're interested, I picked up a few bits that would let me change your appearance, if you're interested.

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Huh, I knew the Makeover Mage said that would work, but I didn't actually believe them!

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Not too shabby from some sheep shears, if I do say so myself!

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Are you looking for a haircut or a shave?

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Are you wanting a new top or some new legwear?

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Really? I got that out of a bin in Draynor! Well, if you're sure...

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Well, they'll keep the sand off your feet at least...

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Suit yourself. Literally, I guess.

sections.title: Attempting to smith on the nearby anvil

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Hey, hands off my anvil!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I just wanted to smith on it! It's right by a bank-

lines.speaker: Chris
lines.text: Because I put it there, you fool! If you want an anvil by a bank, I suggest you find your own!
